messages.content: come up with a fancy name for a meeting comparing one asset manager with another
"The Wealth Vanguard Summit: Unveiling the Paragons of Portfolio Prowess"
now with a hint of tech in it also
"The Digital Wealth Nexus: A Techno-Comparative Convergence of Asset Managers"
Now come up with a fancy team name for a tech team in asset management
"The TechnoFin Titans: Revolutionary Tech Masters of Asset Management"
Make it sorter and should relate to "products"
"The ProTech Productizers: Tech Aces in Asset Management"
make it a single word team name. I like the productizers
FinTechizers
based on the word products
ProdigiTech
Producteers
Produtecs
productizer
Productizer
team producteers
Producteers
Come up with a single word team name for a team supporting products
ProdSupport
a single word team name like "product nexus"
ProdCore
